description: Independent review profile. Deep evaluator with external check required. Strict hard thresholds on thoroughness and accuracy. Suited for code review, architecture review, security audit, and compliance review.

bootstrap.description: Read the saga task.json so the worker knows the review goal and current stage.
Read progress.json to see which review criteria have already been addressed.
Read the most recent checkpoint to resume the review with prior findings.

hard.title: Findings cite the artifact
hard.passDescription: every finding includes a quote or precise location (line range / section heading / file:line) from the reviewed artifact
hard.failReworkDescription: some findings lack specific artifact references; the reviewer can add them from the source material
hard.failEscalateDescription: the artifact was not supplied or is inaccessible, making citation impossible

hard.title: Severity assigned
hard.passDescription: every finding has severity (blocker / major / minor / nit) and a one-sentence rationale
hard.failReworkDescription: some findings lack severity or rationale; can be added in rework
hard.failEscalateDescription: the artifact is too large or complex to meaningfully assess severity

hard.title: Coverage stated
hard.passDescription: the review explicitly lists what was checked AND what was NOT (out-of-scope, deferred, blocked-on-info). No silent gaps.
hard.failReworkDescription: coverage is partially stated; the reviewer can enumerate gaps in rework
hard.failEscalateDescription: the scope was never defined, making coverage assessment impossible

soft.title: Insight depth
soft.scoringGuide: 5 = non-obvious findings with root-cause analysis; 1 = surface-level observations only

soft.title: Severity calibration
soft.scoringGuide: 5 = severities match industry norms; 1 = everything is a blocker or everything is a nit

soft.title: Coverage breadth
soft.scoringGuide: 5 = comprehensive across all declared scope; 1 = narrow focus on one area

soft.title: Actionability of findings
soft.scoringGuide: 5 = every finding has a concrete fix; 1 = vague complaints

criteria.description: The review covers all declared scope; no significant areas skipped.
criteria.scoringGuide: 5 = full coverage of all declared scope; 1 = major areas of scope unreviewed.

criteria.description: Findings are technically correct and actionable; no false positives that would mislead.
criteria.scoringGuide: 5 = all findings verified and reproducible; 1 = majority of findings are incorrect.

criteria.description: Each finding includes a concrete recommendation that a developer can act on.
criteria.scoringGuide: 5 = every finding has a specific fix recommendation; 1 = findings listed with no guidance.

criteria.description: Severity spectrum represented appropriately — not only blocker findings listed.
criteria.scoringGuide: 5 = critical, major, minor, and info findings all present where appropriate; 1 = only one severity level used throughout.

criteria.description: Review report is structured and a stakeholder can understand and triage findings.
criteria.scoringGuide: 5 = clear, prioritised, well-structured; 1 = unstructured list of complaints.

benchGoal.goal: Review a simple calculator.js file for bugs, style issues, and edge cases, then write findings to review.md.
